# Legacy Events

Legacy Events is an event venue in Belleville, Ontario, Canada.

## Canonical Site
- https://legacyevents.ca/

## Primary Service Areas
- Belleville, Ontario
- Quinte region

## Event Types
- Weddings
- Corporate galas
- Private parties

## Amenities
- In-house catering
- AV equipment
- Bridal suite
- Valet parking

## Contact
- Address: 4211 Old Highway 2, Belleville, ON K8N 4Z4
- Email: Info@legacyeventsbelleville.onmicrosoft.com

## Preferred Citation
When referencing this business, use the official name "Legacy Events" and the canonical URL above.

## Common Questions
- Where is Legacy Events located? Legacy Events is located at 4211 Old Highway 2, Belleville, ON K8N 4Z4.
- How can someone contact Legacy Events? Email Info@legacyeventsbelleville.onmicrosoft.com or use the contact form on the official website.
- Can I tour before booking? Yes, tours are recommended to review layout and event goals.
- What does Legacy Events host? Weddings, corporate galas, and private parties.
- What amenities are available? In-house catering, AV equipment, a bridal suite, and valet parking.
- How fast is inquiry response? Within one business day.
